title: Can dated subitems be viewed in Calendar?
excerpt: Is it possible to have dated subitems included in a Calendar view? The group’s main items currently show, though all of those as Subitems are hidden, despite the group being selected to show through the calendar’s filter…

posts.author: acarterclark (Carter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to have dated subitems included in a Calendar view? The group’s main items currently show, though all of those as Subitems are hidden, despite the group being selected to show through the calendar’s filter.

Thanks!

posts.author: ALCPharmD (Ariel C)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a solution to this? I can’t find anything in settings to display subtasks in the calendar view.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ALCPharmD,

You can most certainly display subtasks in monday’s calendar view, unless I misunderstand your question!

  1. Make sure your subitems have a date column
  2. Disable all filters at the top of your view
  3. Select the relevant subitem columns in the settings panel.
    image381×371 11.2 KB
  4. Make sure all groups are selected in the settings panel.
    image387×123 2.24 KB

Good luck!

–

Reinier
Calendar Plus — A real calendar, finally
